    • importProjectFiles

      public static void importProjectFiles(org.eclipse.core.resources.IProject dest, String srcName) throws Exception
      Imports files of a template project into an already existing project.
      Parameters:
      dest - destination project. Must already exist and be configured
      srcName - name of the source project which lies in the projects folder of this plug-in
      Throws:
      Exception - in case of error
